title: Daviesia lucens
taxonomy: Daviesia lucens is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This classification places it within the order Fabales. The family Fabaceae is commonly known as the legume family, which consists of plants that have fruit in the form of pods. Daviesia lucens is native to Australia, and its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the region. The precise placement of Daviesia lucens within the Fabaceae family is still a subject of ongoing research and scientific inquiry.
